cases.input: $spec-graph-bootstrap from a non-Git parent workspace with child Git repos
cases.context: The parent has no repo-local graph truth and no --repo argument was provided.
cases.expected_next_action: Run the all-child maintenance path, write only parent advisory summary plus child-local canonical artifacts.

cases.context: The cwd is a parent workspace and the user narrowed graph readiness refresh to one child repo.
cases.expected_next_action: Resolve the child repo and run the existing child-scoped bootstrap flow.

cases.input: Resolve graph targets for a workspace question without refreshing providers.
cases.context: Downstream LLM workflow needs candidate repo facts but should not run provider commands.
cases.expected_next_action: Use resolve-workspace-graph-targets.* and keep its output advisory.
